title: Kaiser nurses say AI-enabled monitoring is worsening care work
friendlyTitle: Nurses warn that AI monitoring can make care worse
summary: The Markup reported that Kaiser Permanente advice and triage nurses say call metrics, productivity software, and AI systems that rate empathy or tone are pressuring them to shorten patient interactions.
friendlySummary: Some Kaiser nurses say software and AI ratings put pressure on them to finish patient calls faster.
whyItMatters: Workplace AI often arrives as measurement before it arrives as help. The story is a reminder that productivity tools can change incentives in high-stakes jobs, especially healthcare, where speed and care quality can pull in different directions.
friendlyWhyItMatters: AI at work should help people do better work, not push them to rush important human conversations.
